home.title: Eric Games
home.subtitle: Eric – Catan King of Idle Fish

arclight.title: Arclight
arclight.instructions: Each turn you have two actions: a Light action (导光) — send a light beam from a border circle, or a Sight action (验光) — reveal the gem colour of a tile. Click hexagons to perform a Sight action; click border circles to perform a Light action. When you're ready to check the answer, click "See Answer" to reveal all gems and light paths.

orapaMine.title: Orapa Mine
orapaMine.instructions: Fire a wave from a border position (number or letter) to discover where it exits and what gem colours it carries. Click a cell to reveal the gem inside. Click border circles to fire waves.
